summary: Four‑star fan rating highlights overall enjoyment despite no specific comments on sound or performance.
review: The only submitted review gives the recording a solid four stars, noting it was the reviewer’s first Grateful Dead show and expressing general satisfaction. No details are provided about the audio source, mix quality, setlist, or individual performances, leaving both recording and show quality largely undefined.

ai_rating.rationale: Rating based on a single brief review with a 4‑star score; lacks detailed commentary to assess musical or technical aspects.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed feedback on set structure or pacing was given.
